---
title: ""
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    papersize: letter
    geometry:
      - margin=0.6in
    colorlinks: false
    number-sections: false
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{tabularx}
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage[table]{xcolor}
        \pagestyle{empty}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \setlength{\parskip}{0pt}
        \setlength{\tabcolsep}{4pt}
        \renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.45}
        \setlength{\arrayrulewidth}{0.8pt}
        \newcolumntype{Y}{>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}X}
        \newcommand{\rubricpage}{
          \thispagestyle{empty}
          {\centering
          {\LARGE \textbf{AREC 330 Final Presentation Rubric}\par}
          \vspace{0.2em}
          {\normalsize Score each category from 1 to 4. Total possible: 20.\par}
          \par}
          \vspace{0.8em}
          \noindent
          \begin{tabularx}{\linewidth}{@{}p{0.62\linewidth}p{0.12\linewidth}p{0.12\linewidth}p{0.12\linewidth}@{}}
          \textbf{Team / Topic} \hrulefill & \textbf{Date} \hrulefill & \textbf{Total} \hrulefill & \\
          \end{tabularx}
          \vspace{0.8em}
          \footnotesize
          \begin{tabularx}{\linewidth}{|>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{1.45in}|Y|Y|Y|Y|>{\centering\arraybackslash}p{0.58in}|}
          \hline
          \rowcolor[gray]{0.93}
          \textbf{Category} & \centering\textbf{4} & \centering\textbf{3} & \centering\textbf{2} & \centering\textbf{1} & \textbf{Score} \\
          \hline
          \textbf{Intro}\newline Problem motivation is clear, the decision-maker is identifiable, and the decision or question is framed up front.
          & clear, strong, decision-focused
          & mostly clear, minor gaps
          & uneven or weakly connected
          & unclear, missing, or inaccurate
          & \\ \hline
          \textbf{Methods and Data}\newline Data, outcome or unit, and empirical approach are described clearly and tied to the project goal or decision.
          & clear, strong, decision-focused
          & mostly clear, minor gaps
          & uneven or weakly connected
          & unclear, missing, or inaccurate
          & \\ \hline
          \textbf{Conclusions}\newline Main findings are clear, appropriately cautious, and consistent with the evidence shown.
          & clear, strong, decision-focused
          & mostly clear, minor gaps
          & uneven or weakly connected
          & unclear, missing, or inaccurate
          & \\ \hline
          \textbf{Slides}\newline Slides are readable, visually focused, uncluttered, and support the spoken message rather than duplicate it.
          & clear, strong, decision-focused
          & mostly clear, minor gaps
          & uneven or weakly connected
          & unclear, missing, or inaccurate
          & \\ \hline
          \textbf{Communication}\newline Delivery is clear and paced well, team participation is effective, and presenters explain and respond professionally.
          & clear, strong, decision-focused
          & mostly clear, minor gaps
          & uneven or weakly connected
          & unclear, missing, or inaccurate
          & \\ \hline
          \end{tabularx}
          \normalsize
          \vspace{1.0em}
          \textbf{Strengths}\par
          \vspace{0.35em}
          \hrule
          \vspace{1.15em}
          \hrule
          \vspace{1.15em}
          \hrule
          \vspace{1.15em}
          \hrule
          \vspace{1.35em}
          \textbf{Suggestions}\par
          \vspace{0.35em}
          \hrule
          \vspace{1.15em}
          \hrule
          \vspace{1.15em}
          \hrule
          \vspace{1.15em}
          \hrule
          \vspace{1.15em}
          \hrule
        }
---

```{=latex}
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
\newpage
\rubricpage
```
